# GrowwStacks

> GrowwStacks is an AI & automation agency that builds AI agents, Voice AI, and business automation for companies that want to scale without scaling headcount. Make.com Platinum Partner with 2000+ automation projects delivered.

GrowwStacks (legal entity: M TEC Software & Business Automation Pvt. Ltd.) designs and ships custom AI agents, voice assistants, chatbots, and no-code/low-code automations on platforms like Make.com, n8n, and Zapier. The site also publishes a large free library of ready-to-use automation workflows and step-by-step how-to guides.

- Contact: project@growwstacks.com — offices in Marlton, NJ (US) and Mumbai, India.

## Services

- [AI Agents](https://growwstacks.com/services/ai-agents/): Custom autonomous AI agents that handle multi-step business workflows.
- [Voice AI](https://growwstacks.com/services/voice-ai/): AI voice assistants for inbound/outbound calls, booking, and support.
- [AI Chatbots](https://growwstacks.com/services/ai-chatbots/): Context-aware website and WhatsApp chatbots that capture and qualify leads.
- [Make.com Automation](https://growwstacks.com/services/make-automation/): Make.com Platinum Partner — custom scenarios, apps, and integrations.
- [n8n Automation](https://growwstacks.com/services/n8n-automation/): Self-hosted and cloud n8n workflow automation.
- [Zapier Automation](https://growwstacks.com/services/zapier-automation/): Zapier-based integrations and automations.
- [All Services](https://growwstacks.com/services/): Overview of every GrowwStacks service.

## Resources

- [Free n8n Workflows](https://growwstacks.com/workflows/): Library of ready-to-import n8n automation workflows.
- [Make.com Templates](https://growwstacks.com/workflows-make.com/): Library of ready-to-use Make.com automation templates.
- [How-To Guides](https://growwstacks.com/how-to-guides/): Step-by-step automation and AI implementation guides.
- [Blog](https://growwstacks.com/blog/): Articles on AI agents, automation, and business growth.
- [Case Studies](https://growwstacks.com/case-studies/): Real client automation and AI projects with measurable outcomes.

- [About GrowwStacks](https://growwstacks.com/about/): Who we are, our team, and our partner credentials.
